sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66757" key="metallakth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταλλ-ακτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n66757.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one that changes</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μ. πουλύπουν χροός</foreign> Ion Trag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0006.tlg007.perseus-grc1:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
